title: Kaya Gives the Straw Hats a Ship
description: On pages 16–18, Syrup Village moves from battle to farewell as Usopp, Kaya, and the Straw Hats decide what comes after Kuro’s defeat.
scene: The danger has passed, but the emotional weight remains: Usopp must choose between staying with the village that knows his lies and chasing the sea like his father.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm the son of a pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The pirates are here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: out of sadness, he continued to lie after her death

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hoping that someday...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His father's pirate ship might appear in the bay,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: that he would come to pick up his son...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The village- Ers said that was the reason behind his lies

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He probably couldn't leave you alone after you lost your parents,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: for he too experienced that loss in this village

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You will need to become stronger now...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: as a grati- tude of everything he has done for you...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to a new ship and a new crew member!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cheers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Are we really going to do it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course!! We have to succeed the captain!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Meri...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: meri... I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes Ojou- Sama?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm going to become a doctor...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Pirates are here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, that is a good goal!

summary: This part closes Syrup Village by turning Usopp’s lies into a bittersweet farewell, while Kaya’s gift helps the Straw Hats continue their voyage.
